basic_details.job_title: DHGMCH Non-Stipendiary Dental House Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Diamond Harbour Government Medical College & Hospital (DHGMCH)
basic_details.short_information: Diamond Harbour Government Medical College & Hospital (DHGMCH) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 6 Non-Stipendiary Dental House Staff Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

qualification.education_qualification: BDS, Completed BDS Internship from recognized university of India
qualification.details: BDS with completed internship from recognized university of India.

selection_process: Academic Qualification Evaluation Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHGMCH Non-Stipendiary Dental House Staff Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download DHGMCH Non-Stipendiary Dental House Staff Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download DHGMCH Non-Stipendiary Dental House Staff Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHGMCH Non-Stipendiary Dental House Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the DHGMCH Non-Stipendiary Dental House Staff recruitment is 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Non-Stipendiary Dental House Staff position, candidates must possess a BDS degree and have completed their BDS internship from a university recognized in India.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Non-Stipendiary Dental House Staff position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Non-Stipendiary Dental House Staff post is 35 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as stated in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Non-Stipendiary Dental House Staff role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Non-Stipendiary Dental House Staff position involves an evaluation of academic qualifications, followed by an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Non-Stipendiary Dental House Staff position at Diamond Harbour Government Medical College & Hospital is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Non-Stipendiary Dental House Staff post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for the Non-Stipendiary Dental House Staff position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DHGMCH Non-Stipendiary Dental House Staff recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed.

faq.question: Q9. When is the interview scheduled for the Non-Stipendiary Dental House Staff position?
faq.answer: The interview for the Non-Stipendiary Dental House Staff position is scheduled to be held on 03rd July 2026. Candidates should be prepared for the interview on this date.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article, which includes a link to the official website and the notification PDF.
